test:frontend.error: Pre-existing configuration issue: Test files use vitest imports but project uses Jest. auth.test.ts imports from 'vitest', dashboard.test.tsx/onboarding.test.tsx use 'vi' from 'jest' (should be jest.fn()). TypeScript type annotations in mock functions cause parse errors. This is a pre-existing test configuration issue, not introduced by any feature.

test:backend.error: 83 tests pass, 7 errors due to pre-existing fixture setup issue in test_admin_users.py (tables not created in fixtures). Backend database.py was fixed to handle SQLite (pool args issue resolved). Remaining errors are pre-existing test fixture issues, not code issues.

blockingIssues.description: Orphaned Go source files still exist in apps/api/internal/. Commit e9ee4f7 only removed go.mod, go.sum, cmd/server/main.go, and vite.config.ts but did NOT remove the Go source files in internal/ directories.

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed SQLite handling - pool_size/max_overflow args now conditional based on database type
appliedUpdates.reason: Backend tests now runnable with SQLite. Without this fix, database.py crashes on SQLite URL.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the API response envelope convention: when should endpoints return {success: true, data: {...}, error: null} vs direct response format? The inconsistency between auth-google-oauth logout and other endpoints caused a blocking bug.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: auth-google-oauth review found logout() uses readEnvelope but fetchCurrentUser() and signInWithGoogle() don't. No documentation exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary rule: when switching implementation languages (e.g., Go to Python) mid-project, ALL orphaned files from the previous approach must be deleted, not just module files (go.mod, go.sum). The fix feature foundation-fix-1-orphans only removed go.mod/go.sum but left Go source files.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-fix-1-orphans review shows only go.mod/go.sum were removed but 9 Go source files in internal/ directories still exist.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that admin tokens should follow same httpOnly cookie convention as user JWT tokens, or explicitly document why localStorage is acceptable for admin.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: basic-admin-panel stores admin token in localStorage contrary to AGENTS.md 'JWT tokens in httpOnly cookies (not localStorage)' guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add test:api command that sets DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory: and runs pytest with proper SQLite configuration.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Backend tests require DATABASE_URL to be set. database.py now handles SQLite properly after fix.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add dev:setup command that runs docker compose up -d postgres redis and pip install in one step.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Workers had to discover setup steps individually.

testConfigurationIssues.frontend: Test files use vitest imports but project uses Jest. auth.test.ts imports from 'vitest', dashboard.test.tsx/onboarding.test.tsx use 'vi' from 'jest' (should be jest.fn()). TypeScript type annotations in mock functions cause parse errors. This is a pre-existing configuration issue requiring jest.config.ts setup with TypeScript support.
testConfigurationIssues.backend: Test fixtures in test_admin_users.py don't create required tables before tests run. 83 of 90 tests pass. 7 admin user tests fail due to fixture setup issue (no such table: users). This is a pre-existing test fixture issue.
